title: Fullbright+Lowfire+Lowshield
description: Three classic PvP/visibility tweaks in one: Fullbright, Low Fire and Low Shield.
body:
# FLL — Fullbright + Low Fire + Low Shield

**FLL** bundles three of the most-wanted client tweaks into one tiny, client-side mod. Toggle each one on or off, tune it to taste, and get a cleaner, clearer view — especially in PvP.

## ✨ Features

- 💡 **Fullbright** — light up the whole world, see in the dark, caves included. No shaders, no resource packs. Adjustable brightness, and it restores your normal gamma the moment you turn it off.
- 🔥 **Low Fire** — when you're on fire, the flame overlay is pushed down so it stops covering your screen. Height is adjustable.
- 🛡️ **Low Shield** — while you're blocking, the first-person shield is lowered so it doesn't eat half your view. Offset is adjustable.

## 🎛️ How to use

Open the settings through **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**, or bind keys in **Options → Controls → FLL** (open settings / quick-toggle Fullbright). Flip the toggles and drag the sliders to dial each effect in. Everything is saved automatically.

## 📦 Requirements

- **Fabric Loader** + **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** *(optional, recommended — adds a config button)*

Client-side only — safe to use on any server.

---

*Made with ♥ by **x1eqn**.*
